toolPurpose: Retrieve authenticated user's Threads profile information including user ID, username, profile picture URL, and biography. Provides foundational account identification and profile metadata.

fields.description: Specific profile fields to retrieve (default: id, username, threads_profile_picture_url, threads_biography)

toolPurpose: Retrieve list of authenticated user's published threads with metadata including thread ID, media type, text content, publication timestamp, permanent link, and reply status. Supports pagination and time-range filtering.

fields.description: Specific thread fields to retrieve (default: id, media_type, text, timestamp, permalink, is_reply)

since.description: Retrieve threads published after this timestamp (RFC 3339 format, e.g., '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z')

until.description: Retrieve threads published before this timestamp (RFC 3339 format)

limit.description: Maximum number of threads to return (default: 10, max: 100)

toolPurpose: Publish new thread content to authenticated user's Threads account via two-step process (create media container then publish). Supports text-only, image, or video content. REQUIRES explicit Steward confirmation before execution due to public content publication.

media_type.description: Content type for the thread (TEXT for text-only, IMAGE for image content, VIDEO for video content)

text.description: Thread text content (required for TEXT type, optional for IMAGE/VIDEO with captions; max 500 characters)

image_url.description: URL to image file (required if media_type=IMAGE; JPEG or PNG, max 8MB)

video_url.description: URL to video file (required if media_type=VIDEO; MP4 format, max 100MB, max 60 seconds)

alt_text.description: Accessibility alt text for image or video (recommended; max 150 characters)

require_confirmation.description: If true, require explicit Steward confirmation before publishing (default: true)

toolPurpose: Retrieve list of replies to a specific thread including reply ID, text content, author username, and publication timestamp. Enables conversation thread analysis and reply enumeration.

thread_id.description: ID of the parent thread to retrieve replies for

fields.description: Specific reply fields to retrieve (default: id, text, username, timestamp)

limit.description: Maximum number of replies to return (default: 25, max: 100)

toolPurpose: Retrieve aggregated engagement metrics and audience insights for authenticated user's account including views, likes, replies, reposts, and quotes across specified time period. Supports metric filtering and date-range analysis.

metric.description: Specific engagement metrics to retrieve (default: views, likes, replies, reposts, quotes)

since.description: Retrieve insights after this timestamp (RFC 3339 format, e.g., '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z'); default: last 7 days

until.description: Retrieve insights before this timestamp (RFC 3339 format); default: today

granularity.description: Aggregation granularity for time-series data (default: total)
